name: Custom Print Docs
body: [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "[Image: User-added image]"}, {"text": "\n"}, {"text": "\n"}, {"text": "This add-on was built by Maropost"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add-ons and Integrations built in-house by Maropost are documented and supported by our customer service team. If you're having issues with this integration, "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/support/s/ask-us", "children": [{"text": "let us know"}]}, {"text": "!"}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up the Custom Print Docs Add-on"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To create new template sets you need to install the Custom Print Docs add-on:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel click the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the content management section, find the Custom Print Docs add-on and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button in the pop-up window that appears."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once activated, the "}, {"text": "Custom Documents", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu option will appear in the "}, {"text": "Admin", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Create a Custom Print Doc"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To create a custom document template:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Get your web designer or a\u00a0"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://forms.neto.com.au/services/designtweak.html?", "children": [{"text": "Neto partner"}]}, {"text": "\u00a0to create the template for you."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Upload it to your site using SFTP to the /private/www/netosuite/SysDoc/printdocs/custom/order/\u00a0 folder."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Setup & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "All Setting & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select "}, {"text": "System Templates", "bold": true}, {"text": " from the left side menu, and then choose "}, {"text": "Custom Order Templates", "bold": true}, {"text": " and click on "}, {"text": "Add New", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter the "}, {"text": "Template Name", "bold": true}, {"text": " - this will appear in the "}, {"text": "Print", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter the Template Reference. Thie is normally the same at the Template File."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the "}, {"text": "Template File", "bold": true}, {"text": " from the dropdown menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Your web designer or our design team will tell you with the options in the "}, {"text": "Settings", "bold": true}, {"text": " section. Just contact whoever designed the template."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Go to "}, {"text": "Sales Orders", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "View Orders", "bold": true}, {"text": " and scroll down to the "}, {"text": "Bulk Actions", "bold": true}, {"text": " section at the bottom of the page. You will see the new print template at the bottom of the "}, {"text": "Print", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}]
